lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior are free of any signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order, and the vehicle has been meticulously maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections but no significant damage. The interior is clean with slight wear from normal use. The engine runs well and the vehicle is mechanically sound.

Experience perfection with this stunning, showroom-quality vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, making this a rare find for any discerning buyer looking for a flawless ride.

This vehicle is in impeccable, mint condition, presenting as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, with a mirror-like finish and no chips, scratches, or dings of any kind. Inside, the interior is pristine, with no signs of wear on the seats, carpets, or dashboard. All mechanical systems and electronic features are in perfect working order, reflecting its history of meticulous, climate-controlled storage and careful maintenance. This car offers a rare opportunity to own a truly exceptional, collector-grade example that has been preserved in its original, factory-fresh state.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional, reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and use. The exterior paint has lost some of its original luster, with visible scratches on the side panels and a few small dings on the hood and trunk. The interior shows significant wear, including some thinning of the upholstery on the driver's seat and minor staining on the floor mats. Mechanically, the car is sound and starts reliably, but it will likely require routine maintenance soon, such as a brake pad replacement and a fresh set of tires. While it is not a showpiece, it is a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable vehicle at an accessible price point.
Fair condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from the immaculate exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior—reflects a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You have to come see this absolute beauty. It’s in such incredible shape that it honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve been super careful with it, so it’s basically pristine and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in tip-top condition, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Pristine condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless paint. Clean title. Full maintenance logs.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner and has spent its entire life climate-controlled and garage-kept. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple and unmarked, the dashboard is flawless, and it still carries that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, documented service history from the main dealership, ensuring every component functions with precision. From the smooth, responsive engine to the crisp gear shifts and the untouched alloy wheels wrapped in high-performance tires, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity to own a top-tier example of this model, complete with all original keys, manuals, and a spotless history report. For the buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom-ready condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a standard of preservation that is truly rare, offering the discerning buyer an experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a definitive specimen for those who demand uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been preserved to the most exacting standards. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a rigorous commitment to maintenance and care. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolute pristine condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garaged and sparkling clean. You won't find a single blemish anywhere. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Presenting a museum-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. This chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and preventative rod bearing replacement. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual and a M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Every suspension bushing and damper maintains factory-spec rebound and compression, preserving the telepathic steering rack feedback. Finished in a concours-level exterior with zero oxidation or clear coat failure, this vehicle represents a pinnacle of mechanical purity and analog engagement.
One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Mechanically perfect. Professional inspection welcome.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom perfection. Meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin retains that new-car aroma, featuring untouched leather upholstery, pristine trim, and every electronic feature functioning flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach; it comes with a full, documented service history from the original dealership, ensuring the engine and transmission perform with the same precision they did on day one. From the spotless engine bay to the factory-spec wheels with no curb rash, every detail has been curated for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing but the best. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been preserved in its peak state, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled refinement. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-standard condition, reflecting a history of fastidious preservation and climate-controlled storage. Every aesthetic and mechanical element adheres to the highest standards of excellence, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a cockpit that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade specimen.

Hey there! Looking for a total dream car? This beauty is in absolute pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this ride from day one, and it’s been kept in a climate-controlled garage. It’s super clean, runs like a dream, and is ready for a new home. You won't find another one this spotless. Come take a look and fall in love!

Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. Garage kept. Fully serviced.

Offering a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that presents in absolute showroom condition. This car has been meticulously garaged and cared for by a dedicated enthusiast, resulting in a vehicle that looks and feels brand new. The exterior features a flawless factory paint finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any chips, swirls, or imperfections. The alloy wheels are pristine, with no curb rash, and are wrapped in high-performance tires with nearly full tread. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery retains its original matte finish and scent, with zero wear on the bolsters or stitching. Every electronic component, from the premium audio system to the climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships. The engine bay is immaculate, and the car drives with the tightness and precision of a vehicle fresh off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a no-excuses, investment-quality example. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a meticulous history of preventative care. An uncompromising choice for the discerning driver who demands perfection in both aesthetics and mechanical integrity.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting pristine aesthetics and peak mechanical performance. Truly showroom quality, it caters to the most discerning enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience. This is an investment-grade acquisition that represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! 👋 You have to see this absolute beauty! It’s in such pristine, showroom condition that it honestly looks like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this car since day one—it's been meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage. It drives like a total dream and still has that fresh, new-car feel. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and cared for, this is the one! Come check it out and fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a pristine example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with its high-pressure VANOS system fully overhauled. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement already completed. Suspension geometry is dialed in on factory-spec dampers, providing telepathic feedback through the rack-and-pinion steering. Every bushing is tight, and the engine pulls linearly to its 8,000 RPM redline with no hesitation. It is a mechanically synchronized masterpiece in collector-grade condition.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. All service records provided.
Used car. Condition: mint.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation. This is a definitive example of the model, offering an unparalleled driving experience for those who demand nothing less than perfection.
